---
title: "CXCL17 Analysis"
author: "Zada"
date: "2025-11-10"
output: word_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(gtsummary)
library(broom)
library(broom.helpers)
library(gridExtra)
library(doBy)
library(multcomp)
library(gtsummary)
library(gt)
```

**TABLE ONE** 
```{r}
data(hepatoCellular, package = "asaur")

# analysis dataset
analysis_vars <- c("OS", "Death", "CXCL17P", "Tumormultiplicity", "AFP", "AST", 
                   "Tumorsize", "Vascularinvasion", "TNM", "BCLC", "Cirrhosis",
                   "Age", "Gender")

analysis_data <- hepatoCellular[complete.cases(hepatoCellular[analysis_vars]), ]

# Convert categorical variables to factors with labels
cat_vars <- c("Tumormultiplicity", "AFP", "AST", "Tumorsize", "Vascularinvasion", 
              "TNM", "BCLC", "Cirrhosis", "Gender")

analysis_data[cat_vars] <- lapply(analysis_data[cat_vars], as.factor)

levels(analysis_data$Tumormultiplicity) <- c("Solitary", "Multiple")
levels(analysis_data$AFP) <- c("≤25 ng/ml", ">25 ng/ml")
levels(analysis_data$AST) <- c("≤42 U/liter", ">42 U/liter") 
levels(analysis_data$Tumorsize) <- c("≤5 cm", ">5 cm")
levels(analysis_data$Vascularinvasion) <- c("Absent", "Present")
levels(analysis_data$TNM) <- c("I+II", "III+IV")
levels(analysis_data$BCLC) <- c("0-A", "B-C")
levels(analysis_data$Cirrhosis) <- c("Absent", "Present")
levels(analysis_data$Gender) <- c("Female", "Male")

cat("Final sample size for analysis:", nrow(analysis_data), "\n")
```


```{r}
### AIM 2: DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS 

table1_gt <- analysis_data %>%
  tbl_summary(
    include = c("Age", "Gender", "Cirrhosis", "Tumormultiplicity", "AFP", "AST",
                "Tumorsize", "Vascularinvasion", "TNM", "BCLC", "CXCL17P"),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
    label = list(
      CXCL17P ~ "Peritumoral CXCL17",
      Tumormultiplicity ~ "Tumor Multiplicity",
      Vascularinvasion ~ "Vascular Invasion",
      Tumorsize ~ "Tumor Size",
      TNM ~ "TNM Stage",
      BCLC ~ "BCLC Stage",
      Cirrhosis ~ "Liver Cirrhosis"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_caption("**Table 1. Baseline Characteristics of Hepatocellular Carcinoma Patients**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_options(
    table.width = pct(85),
    data_row.padding = px(4)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(size = px(14)),
    locations = cells_title(groups = "title")
  )

table1_gt

```



**DESCRIPTIVE UNIVARIABLE COX--AIM 2**
```{r}
# Univariate Cox models for descriptive purposes (Table 2)
cat("\n--- Univariate Cox Models (Descriptive) ---\n")
uni_models <- list()

covariates <- c("Tumormultiplicity", "AFP", "AST", "Tumorsize", "Vascularinvasion", 
                "TNM", "BCLC", "Cirrhosis", "Age", "Gender")

for (covar in covariates) {
  formula <- as.formula(paste("Surv(OS, Death) ~", covar))
  uni_models[[covar]] <- coxph(formula, data = analysis_data)
}

# Create summary table of univariate results
uni_results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(uni_models, function(model) {
  tidy_model <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
  return(tidy_model)
}))

print(uni_results)
```

**MULTIVARIABLE BOX--AIM 1**
```{r}
### AIM 1: Primary Multivariable Analysis
cat("\n=== AIM 1: PRIMARY MULTIVARIABLE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Primary Cox model
cox_model <- coxph(Surv(OS, Death) ~ CXCL17P + Tumormultiplicity + AFP + AST + 
                     Tumorsize + Vascularinvasion + TNM + BCLC + Cirrhosis, 
                   data = analysis_data)


print(summary(cox_model))
```

```{r}

table_mv <- tbl_regression(
  cox_model,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  estimate_fun = purrr::partial(style_number, digits = 3),
  pvalue_fun = purrr::partial(style_pvalue, digits = 3)
) %>%
  modify_header(label ~ "**Variable**") %>%
  modify_caption("**Table 2. Multivariable Cox Proportional Hazards Model for Overall Survival**") %>%
  bold_labels()

table_mv

```



*CONTRAST* 
```{r}
# Pre-specified contrast: 75th vs 25th percentile
cxcl17_quantiles <- quantile(analysis_data$CXCL17P, probs = c(0.25, 0.75))
cat("\nPre-specified CXCL17P percentiles:\n")
cat("25th:", round(cxcl17_quantiles[1], 2), "75th:", round(cxcl17_quantiles[2], 2), "\n")

```


```{r}
# 75th − 25th percentile difference
cxcl17_q <- quantile(analysis_data$CXCL17P, probs = c(0.25, 0.75))
qdiff <- as.numeric(cxcl17_q[2] - cxcl17_q[1])

# Get coefficient names to ensure exact alignment
coef_names <- names(coef(cox_model))

# Construct contrast vector (all zeros except CXCL17P coefficient scaled by qdiff)
L <- rep(0, length(coef_names))
names(L) <- coef_names
L["CXCL17P"] <- qdiff
 
# esticon to compute HR diff
contrast_est <- esticon(cox_model, L)

print(contrast_est)

cont_HR<-print(exp(contrast_est[,1]))
SE <- contrast_est[,2]
cont_HR

lb_95 <- exp(cont_HR - 1.96 * SE)
ub_95 <- exp(cont_HR + 1.96 * SE)
pval <- contrast_est[,4]

lb_95
ub_95
pval
```





*DIAGNOSTIC PLOTS AND DFBETAS*
```{r}
### DIAGNOSTIC PLOTS
cat("\n=== DIAGNOSTIC PLOTS ===\n")
```


```{r}
ph_test <- cox.zph(cox_model)

# Figure 2: Schoenfeld for PH Assumption
figure2 <- ggcoxzph(ph_test, 
                   font.main = 10,
                   panel.layout = "3x3",
                   ggtheme = theme_bw(base_size = 9))  
print(figure2)
```


```{r}
# Figure 3: Linearity Check (Martingale Residuals)
martingale_resid <- resid(cox_model, type = "martingale")
figure3 <- ggplot(analysis_data, aes(x = CXCL17P, y = martingale_resid)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "red", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Linearity Check: Martingale Residuals vs CXCL17P",
       x = "CXCL17P", y = "Martingale Residuals") +
  theme_bw()

print(figure3)
```

```{r}
# Figure 4: Influential Observations (DFBETAS) using ggcoxdiagnostics
figure4 <- ggcoxdiagnostics(cox_model,
                           type = "dfbetas",
                           linear.predictions = FALSE,
                           title = "Influential Observations: DFBETAS for All Variables") +
  theme_bw()

print(figure4)
```


**AIM 3: ADJUSTED SURVIVAL CURVES**
```{r}

# Data for plotting adjusted survival curves
newdata_plot <- analysis_data[1:2, ]
newdata_plot[] <- lapply(newdata_plot, function(x) {
  if(is.factor(x)) {
    factor(names(which.max(table(x))), levels = levels(x))
  } else {
    mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
})
newdata_plot$CXCL17P <- cxcl17_quantiles
newdata_plot$Group <- c("Low Expression (25th %ile)", "High Expression (75th %ile)")

#  adjusted survival curves
adj_surv_fit <- survfit(cox_model, newdata = newdata_plot)

# Create Figure 1: Adjusted Survival Curves
figure1 <- ggsurvplot(adj_surv_fit, data = newdata_plot,
           conf.int = TRUE,
           legend.title = "CXCL17P Expression",
           legend.labs = c("Low Expression (25th %ile)", "High Expression (75th %ile)"),
           xlab = "Time (Months)",
           ylab = "Overall Survival Probability",
           title = "Adjusted Survival Curves by CXCL17P Expression",
           risk.table = TRUE,
           ggtheme = theme_bw())

print(figure1)
```

**RESULTS SUMMARY**
```{r}
# Extract CXCL17P main effect from multivariable model (without broom::tidy)
model_sum <- summary(cox_model)
idx <- which(names(coef(cox_model)) == "CXCL17P")

logHR <- model_sum$coefficients[idx, "coef"]
SE <- model_sum$coefficients[idx, "se(coef)"]
HR <- exp(logHR)
lower95 <- exp(logHR - 1.96*SE)
upper95 <- exp(logHR + 1.96*SE)
pval <- model_sum$coefficients[idx, "Pr(>|z|)"]

cat("\nPrimary Multivariable Effect of CXCL17P (per unit increase):\n")
cat(sprintf("HR = %.3f (95%% CI: %.3f, %.3f), p = %.4g\n", HR, lower95, upper95, pval))


# Contrast summary (75th vs 25th percentile)
logHR_contrast <- contrast_est[, 1]
SE_contrast <- contrast_est[, 2]
HR_contrast <- exp(logHR_contrast)
lower95_contrast <- exp(logHR_contrast - 1.96 * SE_contrast)
upper95_contrast <- exp(logHR_contrast + 1.96 * SE_contrast)
pval_contrast <- contrast_est[, 4]

cat("\nContrast (75th vs 25th percentile of CXCL17P):\n")
cat(sprintf("HR = %.3f (95%% CI: %.3f, %.3f), p = %.4g\n",
            HR_contrast, lower95_contrast, upper95_contrast, pval_contrast))

```

*CONTRAST TABLE*
```{r}
contrast_table <- tibble(
  Comparison = "75th vs 25th percentile of CXCL17P",
  HR = round(HR_contrast, 3),
  CI = paste0(round(lower95_contrast, 3), " to ", round(upper95_contrast, 3)),
  `p-value` = format.pval(pval_contrast, digits = 3)
) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Table 3. Contrast for CXCL17P (75th vs 25th Percentile)") %>%
  fmt_missing(columns = everything())

contrast_table
```
